lore:quest.name: Wares for the Road
lore:quest.description: Orin Fairwind lost half his stock with his second wagon. Replace 10 leather and 5 string so the trader can keep Elderfall supplied through the siege.
steps: Speak with Orin Fairwind and accept the quest.
Gather 10 leather from cattle or fishing.
Gather 5 string from spiders or cobwebs.
Return to Orin and turn in the goods through his dialogue.
